title: Create: Down to Earth
description: A create-focused mod pack themed around Create's progression
body:
Create: Down To Earth is a quality of life fabric modpack mainly themed around the Create mod (which is why it's part of the title, of course!) It features a fleshed-out quest system to help you work your way through Create's progression system and plenty of recipes to help improve your automation experience. Extra recipes are planned in the future.

Being made on Fabric, I'm trying to put extra effort into performance. If you have any issues, be sure to make an issue on the GitHub with a Spark profile.
